description: Create a 3D mountainous terrain using procedural displacement on a surface with at least 10,000 faces. Use a procedural texture such as Clouds, Musgrave, or Voronoi to generate the landforms. Apply a terrain material with a natural green or brown base color and a roughness value greater than 0.5. Position the camera for a high-angle aerial view from a height of 5 to 30 meters. Render the scene to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/terrain_render.png and save the project to /home/ga/BlenderProjects/terrain_scene.blend.
